Alcohol Use Screening Tests

Alcohol Use Screening Tests 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What are alcohol use screening tests? 
Alcohol use screening tests are questionnaires you answer about your alcohol use. Your responses are used to check for unhealthy alcohol use. Unhealthy alcohol use, also called alcohol misuse, use can cause health problems and may lead to alcohol use disorder Â (AUD). AUD is a brain disorder in which you
